summary_markdown: The following business processes demonstrate how healthcare professionals capture and utilise Core Information Standard data to deliver person-centred care. Each process shows the flow of clinical activities, data collection points, and professional responsibilities required for safe, effective healthcare delivery.

activities.objectives: Capture comprehensive patient demographics, clinical history, and establish care baseline while ensuring data quality and clinical safety
activities.personas: Clinical Information Manager, Health IT System Analyst, Clinical Safety Officer
activities.title: Initial Patient Assessment and Registration

label.text: Discuss preferences and priorities with patient
Revise plan based on patient feedback
Document agreed care plan and obtain consent

activities.objectives: Develop person-centred care plans with agreed goals, actions, and professional responsibilities while ensuring patient involvement and safety
activities.personas: Clinical Information Manager, Clinical Safety Officer, Implementation Project Manager
activities.title: Care Planning and Goal Setting

element_data.label: Discuss preferences and priorities with patient
Revise plan based on patient feedback
Document agreed care plan and obtain consent

label.text: Collect medication information from all sources
Check for drug allergies and contraindications
Create accurate medication list with dosing

activities.objectives: Ensure accurate, complete medication records with safety checks, allergy verification, and appropriate clinical oversight
activities.personas: Clinical Information Manager, Clinical Safety Officer, Health IT System Analyst
activities.title: Medication Reconciliation and Management

element_data.label: Collect medication information from all sources
Check for drug allergies and contraindications
Create accurate medication list with dosing

label.text: Verify patient consent for information sharing

activities.objectives: Enable secure, appropriate information sharing between healthcare providers while maintaining privacy compliance and clinical safety
activities.personas: Data Protection Officer, Health IT System Analyst, Implementation Project Manager
activities.title: Secure Information Sharing and Handover

element_data.label: Verify patient consent for information sharing
